algorithm_input.title: NCARB-derived occupant-load diagram coordination
algorithm_input.design_intent: Paraphrased NCARB-derived scenario: construction document discrepancy before bidding. The optimizer uses fixed source-grounded code semantics while tuning visible design parameters and public scenario-model trade-offs.

scenario_facts.scenario_variant_differentiator: Egress diagram coordination variant with drawing-consistency emphasis.

query_preferences.meaning: prioritize egress diagram consistency and verification

public_scenario_model.purpose: Non-normative task physics/objective-closure constraints visible to optimizers; contains no expected rule IDs or labels.

algorithm_input.visible_input_note: Visible task input only. Algorithms may also read the public scenario model and rule library. Rule labels, rule-derived feasible-region answers, and rule-id bindings remain hidden evaluation references.
algorithm_input.scenario_variant_note: Parameterized variant with substantive changes in facts, bounds, weights, or document context; not a fully independent real project case.
algorithm_input.scenario_variant_differentiator: Egress diagram coordination variant with drawing-consistency emphasis.
